{{Dialogue|A captain|Why should I risk my ship for…|A Wookiee|GRRRAAOUUOO!|A Rebel|He said…|The captain|I know what he said, you Sybrial brain slug. Just tell him to hurry up with the landing coordinates before I change my mind.|attr=The captain of a starship, a Wookiee, and a Rebel|src=<ref name="Challenge" />}}
The '''Sybrial brain slug''' was a type of [[Slug (creature)/Legends|slug]]<ref name="Challenge" /> that shared its name with the [[Sybrial system]] of the [[Vodilux sector]].<ref name="Voyages">{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}}</ref> At one point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], a [[Unidentified Wookiee (Branth)|Wookiee]] hijacked the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of a group of Alliance agents in order to launch a rescue attempt of his family at the Imperial [[Prison Base|prison]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Branth]]. When one of the Rebels translated the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee's]] explanation of his actions to the ship's [[Unidentified captain (Branth)|captain]], the latter voiced their protest. In response, the Wookiee made a loud exclamation in the [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]] [[Language/Legends|language]], but, when the Rebel once again began translating, the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] cut them off, proclaiming his comprehension of the intent behind the utterance and comparing the Rebel to a Sybrial [[Brain/Legends|brain]] slug.<ref name="Challenge" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Sybrial brain slug was mentioned in "[[Wookiees Amok]]," a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] adventure written by [[Timothy M. Ryan]] and published in the [[1989]] [[Challenge 37|thirty-seventh issue]] of the [[Challenge (magazine)|''Challenge'']] magazine for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. Since that adventure was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,<ref name="Challenge" /> it was considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="UnlicensedStatus">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref>
